summary: Tested cleanup-inquiry skip feature (iter32). Found + fixed a critical TDZ ReferenceError ('Cannot access rawText before initialization') in AiPanel.jsx send() — const rawText was declared AFTER the skip branch that referenced it, causing every cleanup-inquiry reply to throw. After moving the declaration above the skip check, all 22/22 skip cases pass (18 match phrasings + 4 non-match), the visible cleanup-skip-btn fires cleanup-completed with skipped=true, and the normal categorization regression flow still works (bulk-approve card renders for 'these are all Office Supplies').
action_items: Verify the rawText hoist fix in /app/frontend/src/components/AiPanel.jsx (moved `const rawText = userMsg;` to line ~1049 immediately after setMessages, so the skip branch can safely reference it). No other changes needed — feature works as spec'd.
critical_code_review_comments: AiPanel.jsx line 1057: `skipRe.test(rawText)` was called BEFORE `const rawText = userMsg` was declared (TDZ). Fixed by hoisting the declaration above the skip branch. Root cause: dev added the skip branch above the existing rawText declaration without noticing.
AiPanel.jsx is 2577 lines — should be split into hooks/modules per <code_review_guidelines> file-size rule (>700 lines).
Repeated React key-collision warnings ('Encountered two children with the same key, null') are logged on Dashboard load — unrelated to this iteration but noisy in console.

success_rate.frontend: 100% after fix (22/22 skip cases + button + regression)

seed_data_creation: None. Skip flow doesn't mutate DB; contact_ids can be arbitrary strings.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter32 skip feature is fully working after the rawText TDZ hoist fix. When testing similar cleanup-inquiry flows, note that (a) emitAction wraps user payload inside `event.detail.payload`, NOT at the top level of detail — so listeners must read `e.detail.payload.skipped` not `e.detail.skipped`. (b) The skip regex uses `\b(?!\w)` anchor so 'Skipper', 'Skippy', 'passes', 'nextgen' correctly fall through to categorization. (c) AiPanel captures currentId at mount — must page.reload() after switching company before dispatching cleanup-inquiry.
rca of the issue: Original code had `const rawText = userMsg;` at line 1079 (inside the cleanup-inquiry branch), but the newly-added skip check at line 1057 referenced `rawText` above the declaration. Because `const` bindings are in the temporal dead zone until the declaration line executes, every cleanup-inquiry response threw `ReferenceError: Cannot access 'rawText' before initialization`, showing as a red uncaught runtime error overlay and preventing both skip and categorization flows from working. Fix: moved `const rawText = userMsg;` to line 1049, immediately after the user message is appended and before the skip branch. Verified via Playwright: 22/22 skip phrasings work, 4/4 non-match phrasings correctly fall through, cleanup-skip-btn works, and regression categorization still renders the bulk-approve plan.
